metadata.description: A person in their 20s, appearing female, has fair skin with some visible texture and a few small freckles across the nose and cheeks. The face is oval-shaped with a gently rounded jawline. Their hair is very short, buzz-cut style, light blonde, and appears fine-textured, with a natural hairline. The eyes are almond-shaped and a warm amber color, set moderately apart. Eyebrows are medium thickness, well-defined, and arched. The nose is straight with a slightly rounded tip. Lips are medium thickness with a well-defined cupid's bow. The person has a subtle, closed-mouth smile, with the head tilted slightly to the left, conveying a friendly and approachable expression.
